description.ko: 존재의 규모가 항성의 심연이라는 영원한 아름다움 속으로 잦아드는, 고요하고 숨막히는 우주의 깊은 곳으로 떠나는 심오한 여정입니다.
description.en: A profound journey into the silent, breathtaking depths of the universe, where the scale of existence fades into the eternal beauty of the stellar abyss.

prompt: A cinematic and hyper-realistic depiction of a cosmic abyss, swirling dark nebulae with iridescent edges, glowing star clusters in the far distance, ethereal light rays piercing through obsidian space dust, 8k resolution, photorealistic, deep indigo and violet color palette, infinite depth, atmospheric lighting.
